name: Discord Notification Fanout
description: Load balancer → API servers → message queue → fanout service → delivery

name: URL Shortener
description: Load balancer → API server → cache + database for redirect lookups

name: Instagram Feed
description: Load balancer → API → cache → fanout pre-computation → database

name: Uber Ride Dispatch
description: Load balancer → API → queue → matching server → database

name: Basic CRUD App
description: Load balancer → server → database. The simplest production architecture.

name: Resilience Showcase
source: Phase 3 demo: circuit breaker + retry storm + backpressure on one graph
description: LB → API → DB with a throttled DB. Runs traffic heavy enough to trip the breaker, trigger retry storms, and activate backpressure.
